layout.subtitle: Manage your account, player profile, and creator profile in one place.

player.title: Player profile
player.nicknameLength: Nickname must be between 3 and 60 characters.
player.bioPlaceholder: Tell others a bit about you (max 2000 characters).
player.bioTooLong: Bio must be at most 2000 characters.
player.openProfileNewTab: View public player profile (opens in new tab)
player.noPlayerBody: Your account is not linked to a player profile yet.
player.stellarIconHint: Choose which subscriber badge appears next to your name on your profile and on leaderboards.

preview.exitAria: Exit preview mode and show all settings

headerSurface.closeConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Discard them and close?
headerSurface.title: Card background
headerSurface.hint: Stack gradients and an optional background image. Reorder layers to blend; save to upload images.
headerSurface.lockedHint: TUFStellar subscribers can customize the profile card background.
headerSurface.lockedHasSaved: You have a saved style, it will appear again once you resubscribe.
headerSurface.imageLayerExists: Only one background image layer is allowed.
headerSurface.removeLayerConfirm: Remove this layer from the stack?
headerSurface.imageSaveHint: Image uploads when you save. Reorder the image layer in the list to blend with gradients above or below.
headerSurface.linkSizeLinked: Link size — use the same value for X and Y
headerSurface.layerRenameAria: Double-click or double-tap to rename layer
headerSurface.clearStyleConfirm: Replace the entire card background with the default gradient layer? Pending image uploads in this session will be cleared. Save to apply on your profile.
headerSurface.invalidFileType: Unsupported image type. Use JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, or SVG.
headerSurface.imageFileTooLarge: Image must be {{maxMb}} MB or smaller.
headerSurface.imageDimensionsTooSmall: Image must be at least {{minWidth}}×{{minHeight}} pixels.
headerSurface.imageUnreadable: Could not read this image file.

banner.presetHint: Pick a free banner from the list
banner.freePresetsHiddenForCustom: Free banners are hidden while a custom banner is selected.
banner.customEmpty: Wider images fit the header better
banner.dropzonePrimary: Click or drop an image here
banner.invalidFileType: Unsupported image type. Use JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, or SVG.
banner.lockedHint: You have a saved custom banner, but it is inactive until you resubscribe, a free preset is shown for now.
banner.manifestLoadError: Could not load the banner list; only the default preset is available until this is fixed.

creator.title: Creator profile
creator.displayNameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters.
creator.displayNameTooLong: Name must be at most 100 characters.
creator.bioPlaceholder: Tell others a bit about you as a creator (max 2000 characters).
creator.bioTooLong: Bio must be at most 2000 characters.
creator.uploadConditionsPlaceholder: When and how you accept chart uploads (max 2000 characters). Shown to visitors on your public profile.
creator.uploadConditionsTooLong: Upload conditions must be at most 2000 characters.

curationBadges.empty: No curation types on credited levels yet.

creator.aliasesHint: Up to {{max}} names for search. Cannot match your display name or any other creator’s name or alias (case-insensitive).
creator.aliasesTooShort: Each alias must be at least 2 characters
creator.stellarIconHint: Choose which subscriber badge appears next to your name on your profile and on the creators list.
creator.openPublicProfileNewTab: View public creator profile (opens in new tab)
creator.noCreatorBody: Your account is not linked to a creator profile yet.
creator.loadErrorBody: Try again later or open your public profile.
